sentence: Savvidad spent on someone who will only appricot it is savvidad wasted.

wombos.definition: To genuinely appreciate someone or something and then immediately forget about it. The fond, distracted form of gratitude that never quite sticks.
wombos.example: I appricotted his help — said thanks, walked off, never thought about it again.

wombos.definition: Savvy skill or practical intelligence — a street-smart, capable mastery of a subject or situation, with habilidad (Spanish: ability) as its foundation.
wombos.example: He navigated the whole system with pure savvidad.
